title: varronia harleyi
intro: Varronia harleyi, also known as the 'Iracema', is a plant species within the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Varronia harleyi include its potential to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Varronia harleyi typically involve the use of its leaves, which can be made into infusions, tinctures, or dried for later use in teas and infusions.
